archive_summary.title: Project Costs

included_content.item: budget summary and per-task cost breakdown

section.title: Project Costs (Full Detail)
section.content:
Total budget: $100.00 Total spent: $0.06 Budget remaining: $99.94 Spent: 0.1%
### Cost Breakdown by Category
* anthropic_api: $0.06
### Cost Breakdown by Service
* anthropic_api: $0.06
### Per-Task Costs
* t0001_brainstorm_results_1: $0.00 * t0002_literature_survey_granularity_conditioning: $0.00 * t0003_download_benchmark_subsets: $0.00 * t0004_brainstorm_results_2: $0.00 * t0005_hierarchical_annotation_pilot_v1: $0.06 * t0006_scope_aware_react_library: $0.00 * t0007_scope_unaware_planandsolve_library: $0.00 * t0008_brainstorm_results_3: $0.00 * t0011_metric2_calibration_aggregator: $0.00
